SEARCH
程序包 AccountType

类 SavingAccount

java.lang.Object
AccountType.Account
AccountType.SavingAccount
public class SavingAccount extends Account
Represents a savings account with a fixed interest rate and term. This class handles the operations related to the depositing of funds, setting terms, and calculating interest over those terms.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    SavingAccount()
    Default constructor that initializes the saving account with a unique account number.
    SavingAccount(double balance, String accountName, String accountPassword, String accountNumber, double interestRate, int spanDays, double interest, String startTime, String endTime)
    Constructs a SavingAccount with specified details.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • SavingAccount

      public SavingAccount()
      Default constructor that initializes the saving account with a unique account number.

    • SavingAccount

      public SavingAccount(double balance, String accountName, String accountPassword, String accountNumber, double interestRate, int spanDays, double interest, String startTime, String endTime)
      Constructs a SavingAccount with specified details.
      参数:
      balance - the initial balance
      accountName - the account holder's name
      accountPassword - the account password
      accountNumber - the account number
      interestRate - the initial interest rate
      spanDays - the number of days for the deposit term
      interest - the calculated interest to be added at the end of the term
      startTime - the start date of the deposit term
      endTime - the end date of the deposit term

  • 方法详细资料

    • chooseInterest

      public static double chooseInterest(String term)
      Selects the interest rate based on the deposit term. Different terms have different fixed annual interest rates.
      参数:
      term - the deposit term, which affects the interest rate
      返回:
      the annual interest rate for the specified term

    • setDepositTerm

      public void setDepositTerm(String term)
      Sets the deposit term details including the start time, end time, interest rate, and span. Calculates and logs the expected interest based on the initial balance.
      参数:
      term - the term for which the account is set, e.g., "one_year"

    • depositTermFinished

      public void depositTermFinished()
      Ends the deposit term and adds the calculated interest to the account balance. Only modifies the account if the current date is after or on the end date.

    • reinforceTermFinished

      public void reinforceTermFinished()
      Forces the termination of the deposit term without adding any accrued interest.

    • compareDates

      public int compareDates(String dateStr1, String dateStr2)
      Compares two date strings and returns the result.
      参数:
      dateStr1 - the first date string
      dateStr2 - the second date string
      返回:
      an integer indicating the order of the dates

    • calculateEndDate

      public String calculateEndDate(String startDateStr, int days)
      Calculates the end date from a given start date and a number of days.
      参数:
      startDateStr - the start date in string format
      days - the number of days to add to the start date
      返回:
      the end date as a formatted string

    • creatAccount

      public String creatAccount(String email)
      Creates a new account file with initial balance and creation date.
      参数:
      email - the email associated with the account
      返回:
      the path to the created account file

    • getCurrentTimeString

      public static String getCurrentTimeString()
      Gets the current time formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".
      返回:
      the formatted current time

    • setInterestRate

      public void setInterestRate(double fdrate)
      Sets interest rate.
      参数:
      fdrate - the fdrate

    • getInterestRate

      public double getInterestRate()
      Gets interest rate.
      返回:
      the interest rate

    • getEndTime

      public String getEndTime()
      Gets end time.
      返回:
      the end time

    • setEndTime

      public void setEndTime(String endTime)
      Sets end time.
      参数:
      endTime - the end time

    • getStartTime

      public String getStartTime()
      Gets start time.
      返回:
      the start time

    • setStartTime

      public void setStartTime(String startTime)
      Sets start time.
      参数:
      startTime - the start time

    • getInterest

      public double getInterest()
      Gets interest.
      返回:
      the interest

    • setInterest

      public void setInterest(double interest)
      Sets interest.
      参数:
      interest - the interest

    • getSpanDays

      public int getSpanDays()
      Gets span days.
      返回:
      the span days

    • setSpanDays

      public void setSpanDays(int spanDays)
      Sets span days.
      参数:
      spanDays - the span days
